title: Device Home Screen - Full Support After Launch Date When LM Version Meets or Exceeds Required
scenario: Device home screen shows full support (green connection dot) when installed LM version meets or exceeds required version after device launch date
steps: Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Pair with the headset (ensure the headset is ON and properly connected).
Verify the Home screen displays full support for the device.
Confirm the Connection status icon shows a green dot.
expected: The Home screen shows full support for the device, and the Connection status icon displays a green dot.
